Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Continued To Jun-04-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is continued to June 4, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 19, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
